subcodes.first_line: O steadfast and noble one! Your letter was received. It is as was previously written. The Blessed Beauty appointed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت نابت نامه شما رسید همانست که از پیش مرقوم گردید جمال مبارک معین و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @consolation and comfort, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick, @power; influence of a single soul in teaching the Cause, @words vs deeds, @wisdom [hikmat]
